component.name: Menu
component.description: The popup surface that holds a vertical list of rows — action commands plus optional checkbox/radio selections, category groups, and separators. Driven declaratively by an `items: MenuNode[]` array and usually rendered inside DropdownMenu, but works standalone.
component.note: White surface, 1px neutral.200 border, radius-sm (4px), shadow-overlay, min-width 180px. Rows are action / checkbox / radio; selected rows take the forest tint (forest.50 fill, forest.700 text + indicator). Owns roving-tabindex arrow-key navigation. Hover/press/focus are real CSS pseudo-states (no `state` prop), matching Button/Checkbox. Synced to Figma '❖ Menu' and its DropdownItem parts (677:5552).

surface.scroll: set maxHeight to cap height + overflow-y auto with a stable scrollbar gutter (Figma 'Scrollable')

row.padding: spacing.base spacing.md (8px 16px) default / spacing.xs spacing.md (6px 16px) compact

indicators.checkbox: 14px sharp box (radius.none), 1px neutral.300 border; on → forest.500 fill + border, white check mark
indicators.radio: 14px circle (radius.pill), 1px neutral.300 border; on → forest.500 ring + 8px forest.500 dot
indicators.indicatorWell: 20px square that centers the 14px box/circle (aligns to row gap)
indicators.disabled: neutral.300 border (neutral.disabled), neutral.disabled fill; dot → neutral.400

tokens.focusRing: 2px colors.border.primary.strong (forest.700), inset (offset -2px so the ring stays within the row)

useCases: Action menu opened from a trigger button (the popup body of DropdownMenu)
Overflow / 'more actions' (…) menu on a card, row, or toolbar
Multi-select option list using checkbox rows (stays open on toggle)
Single-select option list using radio rows (e.g. sort / view mode)
Grouped command list with category headings and separators
Long, scrollable picker — cap with maxHeight
usage.frequency: single (one open surface at a time, usually owned by DropdownMenu)

commonPatterns.name: Action menu
commonPatterns.description: A flat list of command rows that each fire onSelect; the usual DropdownMenu body.
commonPatterns.jsx: <Menu label='Actions' items={[{ id: 'edit', label: 'Edit', iconBefore: 'pencil' }, { id: 'dup', label: 'Duplicate', iconBefore: 'copy' }, { type: 'separator' }, { id: 'del', label: 'Delete', iconBefore: 'trash', isDisabled: !canDelete }]} onSelect={(id) => run(id)} />

commonPatterns.name: Grouped menu with categories
commonPatterns.description: MenuGroup nodes add a heading above their rows; separators divide sections.
commonPatterns.jsx: <Menu label='Insert' items={[{ label: 'Blocks', items: [{ id: 'text', label: 'Text' }, { id: 'img', label: 'Image' }] }, { type: 'separator' }, { label: 'Embeds', items: [{ id: 'yt', label: 'YouTube' }] }]} onSelect={insert} />

commonPatterns.name: Multi-select (checkbox rows)
commonPatterns.description: type:'checkbox' rows show the box indicator and stay open as the user toggles each isSelected.
commonPatterns.jsx: <Menu label='Columns' items={cols.map(c => ({ id: c.key, type: 'checkbox', label: c.name, isSelected: visible.has(c.key) }))} onSelect={toggleColumn} />

commonPatterns.name: Single-select (radio rows)
commonPatterns.description: type:'radio' rows in a group express a one-of-many choice within the menu (e.g. sort order).
commonPatterns.jsx: <Menu label='Sort by' items={[{ id: 'new', type: 'radio', label: 'Newest', isSelected: sort === 'new' }, { id: 'old', type: 'radio', label: 'Oldest', isSelected: sort === 'old' }]} onSelect={setSort} />

commonPatterns.name: Scrollable picker
commonPatterns.description: Pass maxHeight to cap the surface and scroll the rows past it (Figma 'Scrollable').
commonPatterns.jsx: <Menu label='Timezone' maxHeight={280} items={zones.map(z => ({ id: z, label: z }))} onSelect={pick} />

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Menu as an always-visible primary navigation
antiPatterns.reason: Menu is a transient popup surface; persistent navigation should be visible and orientation-aware.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Tabs for in-page section switching, or a side-nav for app navigation.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using radio rows where a labelled form control fits better
antiPatterns.reason: A mutually-exclusive choice that lives in a form reads clearer as a grouped form control than as menu rows.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use RadioGroup for single-choice form fields; reserve radio rows for in-menu options like sort/view mode.

antiPatterns.scenario: Closing the menu when a menuitemcheckbox is toggled
antiPatterns.reason: Checkbox rows model multi-select; closing on each toggle forces a reopen per change.
antiPatterns.alternative: Keep the menu open on checkbox toggle; only action rows (and optionally radio rows) should dismiss it.

antiPatterns.scenario: Putting an icon on a checkbox or radio row via iconBefore
antiPatterns.reason: Checkbox/radio rows render their selection indicator in the leading slot; iconBefore/iconAfter apply to action rows only.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use iconBefore/iconAfter on action rows; let checkbox/radio rows own the leading indicator.

antiPatterns.reason: The role='menu' list has no accessible name for screen-reader users.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass label, or aria-labelledby pointing at the trigger/heading that names the menu.

slots.items: Ordered MenuNode[] — MenuItem rows, MenuGroup sections, and MenuSeparator dividers may be freely mixed
slots.label / description: Per-row primary text and optional secondary line (neutral.500, 12px)
slots.iconBefore / iconAfter: Leading / trailing 20px Icon on action rows only

parentConstraints: Rendered in a popover/portal owned by DropdownMenu
Can stand alone but expects an external trigger to manage open/close and Escape

interactions.hover: unselected row → neutral.100 fill; selected row → forest.100 fill; also sets the active (roving-focus) row
interactions.press: unselected row → neutral.200 fill; selected row → forest.200 fill
interactions.focus: 2px forest.700 outline, inset (-2px offset) so the ring stays within the row
interactions.selected: forest.50 fill, forest.700 text + indicator; checkbox shows white check, radio shows forest.500 dot
interactions.disabled: neutral.400 text, muted indicator, cursor not-allowed; row is skipped by keyboard navigation
interactions.click: fires the row's onSelect(id) then the menu-level onSelect(id, item); disabled rows are inert

behavior.navigation: Roving tabindex — exactly one enabled row is tabbable (tabIndex 0), the rest are -1; ArrowDown/ArrowUp wrap focus across enabled rows, Home/End jump to first/last, disabled rows are skipped. autoFocusFirst focuses the first enabled row on mount (set by DropdownMenu when it opens). onKeyDown is forwarded to the surface first (e.g. for DropdownMenu's Escape handler).
behavior.controlled: Selection is fully controlled by the caller: pass isSelected per row and update it in response to onSelect. The component holds no selection state — only the active (focused) row index.

responsive.maxHeight: optional cap that turns the surface into a scroll region with a stable scrollbar gutter

accessibility.role: menu (the list); rows are menuitem / menuitemcheckbox / menuitemradio; groups are role='group'; dividers are role='separator'
accessibility.ariaChecked: checkbox/radio rows expose aria-checked reflecting isSelected; action rows omit it
accessibility.grouping: MenuGroup renders a labelled role='group' with aria-labelledby pointing at its heading span
accessibility.naming: The menu takes its accessible name from aria-labelledby (preferred) or label; group rows from their heading
accessibility.focusManagement: Roving tabindex — focus moves between rows with arrows/Home/End, never tabbing to each row; autoFocusFirst lands focus on the first enabled row on open
accessibility.keyboardSupport: ArrowDown/ArrowUp move focus (wrapping, skipping disabled); Home/End jump to first/last; Enter/Space activate the focused row; Escape is handled by the parent via forwarded onKeyDown
accessibility.screenReader: Announced as a menu with item count; checkbox/radio rows announce checked state; group headings announce section context
accessibility.contrastNote: neutral.600 row text and forest.700 selected text on their respective fills meet AA; white check on forest.500 meets AA.

athenaConstraints.selectedTint: forest.50 fill + forest.700 text/indicator (single brand accent)
athenaConstraints.checkboxRadius: radius.none (14px sharp box, matches Checkbox atom)
athenaConstraints.api: declarative items array, mirroring the Tabs / RadioGroup array-driven convention

figmaDivergences.figma: explicit state property on rows (default / hover / press / focus)
figmaDivergences.reason: Matches Button/Checkbox; pseudo-states are driven by the browser rather than a prop.

aiHints.context: Reach for Menu as the body of a popup of actions or options — the surface a Button/DropdownMenu opens. Use action rows for commands, checkbox rows for multi-select (keep it open on toggle), radio rows for an in-menu single choice. Group related rows with MenuGroup headings and divide sections with separators. Cap long lists with maxHeight. Selection is controlled — drive isSelected from your state and update it in onSelect.
neverUseWhen: You need always-visible navigation — use Tabs or a side-nav, not a transient popup
A mutually-exclusive choice belongs in a form — use RadioGroup instead of radio rows
You would close the surface on every checkbox toggle — multi-select menus stay open
The menu has no label and no aria-labelledby — the list has no accessible name
